units.disciplines: Undergraduate major and minor; PhD; Graduate Certificate in Religious Studies; Certificate in Ancient Mediterranean Languages

units.disciplines: French; Italian; Portuguese; Spanish; undergraduate majors and minors; graduate and PhD programs

units.disciplines: Undergraduate program; Graduate program; African Languages program

units.disciplines: Master of City and Regional Planning (MCRP); PhD in Planning; Urban Studies and Planning minor

units.disciplines: BA in Economics; BS in Economics; Economics Minor; Master's in Economics; PhD in Economics

units.disciplines: Geography; GIScience; applied data science

units.disciplines: Marine science; Environmental science; Ecology; Coastal management; Earth sciences

units.disciplines: Arts; Humanities

units.disciplines: Area studies; History; Languages and linguistics; Cultural studies; Migration studies

units.disciplines: Asian studies; Area studies; Global studies

units.focus_areas: European Union studies; European politics and history; transatlantic relations; language and area studies; K-12 and community outreach
units.disciplines: European studies; political science; history; area studies

units.focus_areas: Teaching and academic courses; research initiatives; community outreach and partnerships; student funding and fellowships; public events and conferences; study abroad and internships
units.disciplines: Jewish Studies; Religion; Modern Hebrew; interdisciplinary studies

units.disciplines: Economics; Business administration; Finance; Policy analysis; Community development

units.disciplines: Public health; Water sanitation and hygiene; Environmental health

units.disciplines: Biostatistics; epidemiology; data management; clinical trials coordination
